sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36380" key="e)nugrante/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνυγρ-αντέον</orth>, <sense id="n36380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must moisten,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
